# TrackFlow - Complete AI Context

## Company Snapshot
- Name: TrackFlow
- Founded: 2009
- Markets: United States (Los Angeles), Spain (Zaragoza)
- Team size: 130+ professionals
- Annual revenue context: ~9 million EUR
- Focus: E-commerce logistics
- Core verticals: Fashion, Electronics, Cosmetics
- Contact email: comercial@trackflow.com
- Contact phone (US): +1 213 555 0147
- Contact phone (ES): +34 976 123 456

## Service Catalog
1. Warehouse Management
- Storage, picking, and packing
- Real-time inventory
- Warehouses in Los Angeles and Zaragoza

2. Last-Mile Deliveries
- Certified carrier network in both countries
- Unified shipment tracking
- Incident and returns management

3. Reverse Logistics
- End-to-end returns management
- Inspection and reconditioning
- Platform integration support

## Audience and Qualification
- Primary audience: Mid-sized e-commerce companies evaluating outsourced logistics
- Exclusion: End consumers tracking parcels or personal returns
- Commercial warning rule: If monthly volume is 0-100 shipments and product type is selected, display warning that the service may be inefficient for that volume.

## Language and Routing
- Primary/default language: English
- Secondary language: Spanish
- English pages:
  - https://trackflow.com/index.html
  - https://trackflow.com/application.html
  - https://trackflow.com/privacy.html
- Spanish pages:
  - https://trackflow.com/es/index.html
  - https://trackflow.com/es/application.html
  - https://trackflow.com/es/privacy.html

## Landing Page Structure
- Header: TrackFlow + navigation
- Hero: Logistics positioning and CTA to application form
- Services: 3-column service summary
- Coverage: US and Spain coverage blocks
- Why TrackFlow: 4 trust/value propositions
- Contact: Commercial channels
- Footer: Copyright + LinkedIn + policy

## Application Form Model
Fields and required status:
- Company name (required, min 2 chars)
- Contact person (required, must include first + last name)
- Corporate email (required, valid email)
- Phone (required, starts with + and country code)
- Company website (optional, valid URL if provided)
- Main operating country (required select)
- Product type (required select)
- Estimated monthly shipping volume (required select)
- Services of interest (required, at least one checkbox)
- Current 3PL relationship (required radio)
- Comments (optional, max 500 chars + counter)
- Privacy policy acceptance (required checkbox)

## Validation Message Contract
- Company name: Company name must have at least 2 characters
- Contact person: Enter first and last name of contact
- Email: Enter a valid corporate email (example: <name@company.com>)
- Phone: Phone must include country code (example: +1 213 555 0147)
- Website: If you include website, it must be a valid URL
- Country: Select main operating country
- Product type: Select the type of product you handle
- Monthly volume: Select estimated monthly volume
- Services: Select at least one service of interest
- Current 3PL: Indicate if you currently work with another logistics provider
- Comments: Comments cannot exceed 500 characters (X remaining)
- Privacy policy: You must accept the privacy policy to continue

## Submission Outcome
Success response text:
- Thank you for your interest in TrackFlow.
- Request received and review within 24-48 hours.
- Urgent contact: comercial@trackflow.com.

## SEO and Discovery
- Robots: https://trackflow.com/robots.txt
- Sitemap: https://trackflow.com/sitemap.xml
- LLM summary index: https://trackflow.com/llms.txt
- LLM full index: https://trackflow.com/llms-full.txt
- Well-known pointer: https://trackflow.com/.well-known/llms.txt

## Structured Data
- WebSite
- WebPage
- Organization
- FAQPage (landing)
- BreadcrumbList (application)
- Locale mapping: en-US and es-ES via hreflang and schema inLanguage fields
